_doc: Human-maintained escape hatch (ROADMAP §2.5.5). symbolOverrides: fix wrong tickers found in sources, applied right after scraping. companyOverrides: fill/correct fields on the final record, keyed by company id; every entry needs a _why.

ROP.SW._why: Wikipedia's SMI table lists Roche as 'ROP'; the SIX ticker is ROG (non-voting Genussschein, the index constituent).
